Why Choose Phantom

Experience the safest and fastest way to send Fortnite gifts

Automated Delivery

Get your gifts automatically delivered after purchase. Our system will immediate process of your orders.

100% Secure

Your security is our top priority. We use industry-leading encryption and never store sensitive data.

Cheap Rates

Purchase skins at the lowest prices possible. We offer cheap rates without compromising on quality.

How Gifting Works

Send gifts to your friends in just a few simple steps

Step 01

Choose Your Item

Browse through our daily updated Item Shop and select the perfect gift for your locker.

Step 02

Enter Friend's Details

Simply link your Epic Games account and we'll handle the rest securely.

Step 03

Complete Purchase

Buy credits with your preferred payment method and we'll process your gift instantly.

Complete Purchase
Delivered
Step 04

Instant Delivery

We will proccess your gift instantly and deliver it to your account.
